title: Gooey Kenyan Garlic Stir-fry
description: A savory and aromatic one-pot dish combining garlic with pineapple for a gooey, garlicky flavor profile that's both tasty and jain-friendly.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and paprika. Cook for an additional minute.
Pour in tomato paste and stir to combine well with onions and garlic.
Add pineapple and coconut milk. Stir until fully combined, bringing the mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low, cover skillet, and let simmer for about 10-15 minutes or until thickened and glossy.
Season with salt to taste if needed. Serve hot as is or garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro or parsley.
